creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
multimedia/emby-server users also want OPUS enabled, see
https://github.com/MediaBrowser/Emby/blob/3.2.70.0/MediaBrowser.Controller/MediaEncoding/EncodingHelper.cs#L398

Not to be confused with FFmpeg's own (experimental) Opus encoder.
https://git.ffmpeg.org/gitweb/ffmpeg.git/commitdiff/5f47c85e5c96
